channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: NASA Administrator Nominee Jared Isaacman Faces Questions on Unconventional Background and Commercial Ties
item.description: Jared Isaacman, billionaire CEO nominee to become NASA administrator, faces questions on his unconventional background and ties to the commercial space industry during a Senate hearing.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: A New Take on Pride and Prejudice: A Faithful Adaptation by Netflix
item.description: Netflix is set to release a new adaptation of Jane Austen's classic novel, 'Pride & Prejudice'. The six-episode series will be written by Dolly Alderton and directed by Euros Lyn. With an impressive cast including Emma Corrin as Elizabeth Bennet and Jack Lowden as Mr Darcy, this adaptation is expected to soar above the bar set by Netflix's 2022 Austen adaptation.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
